title: Karuva Karuva Payale Lyrics Karuppan
stanzas:
karuva karuva payale
ena ketkaama
thoda vaayaa
sootta yeththaama

varava varava puyale
una thaakkaama
vidamaatten
aattam paakkaama

ennavenaa enna neeyum
senjikoyaa
nidham pookura
thamaraiyaa

ippa paaru unna naanum
mutta poren
adi aathi nee
thaanguviyaa

neruppaa
en aakuriye sevappaa

karuva karuva payale
ena ketkaama
thoda vaayaa
sootta yeththaama

varava varava puyale
una thaakkaama
vidamaatten

velanja kaatta
verikkum maatta

paayum unmela

kodhikkum sootta
nethaikkum aatta
thuninji varuva
aattaatha vaala

vesa kaaththaaa
pogaatha moochoda
veriyerum ...
vaaarene kooththaada

vedakozhi rusiyethi
virundhu podendi
naan saapida

karuva karuva payale
ena ketkaama
thoda vaayaa
sootta yeththaama

adukku paana
murukku pola
enaiyum norukku
neram paakaatha

aluppu theera
anaikka poren
odambu valichaa
oora koottaatha.

... pesaatha
vaayaala
adi podi
paappendi nooraalaa

polikaala unna naane
adakka porene
maaraappula.

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the theme of Karuva Karuva Payale?

The song is a vibrant and energetic folk number that celebrates rustic romance.

Who are the singers of Karuva Karuva Payale?

The song is sung by Shankar Mahadevan and Shashaa Tirpathi.

Who composed the music for Karuppan?

The music for the movie Karuppan was composed by D Imman.

What is the context of the song in the movie?

The song is set in a celebratory context, highlighting the lead characters' vibrant and playful romance.

When was Karuva Karuva Payale released?

The song was released in the year 2017.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In the movie Karuppan, Karuva Karuva Payale is a lively folk song that showcases the playful and romantic chemistry between the lead characters. Sung by Shankar Mahadevan and Shashaa Tirpathi, the song is infused with energetic beats and rustic charm, thanks to D Imman's vibrant composition. The lyrics convey a sense of joyous celebration and love, making it a perfect fit for festive occasions. The song captures the essence of rural romance with its catchy tune and spirited performance, leaving listeners feeling uplifted and entertained.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Experience the vibrant energy of Karuva Karuva Payale from the movie Karuppan, where Shankar Mahadevan and Shashaa Tirpathi's voices blend seamlessly with D Imman's dynamic composition. This song captures the essence of rustic romance with a lively folk twist. Dive into the world of Karuppan and feel the pulse of its captivating beats.
stanzaMeanings: Dark, dark boy, come closer without asking, without making a fuss.
Come, come storm, I won't let you hit me, I won't let you watch the dance.
What are you doing? Are you playing tricks like a blooming lotus?
Look now, I'm going to clash with you, will you withstand it?
Fire, my anger is red.
Dark, dark boy, come closer without asking, without making a fuss.
Come, come storm, I won't let you hit me, I won't let you watch the dance.
The wind that blows will not stop, if it thinks of you, it will jump on you.
The boiling pot will overflow, the cloth will come torn, the untamed tail.
The wind won't go with the breath, it will rise fiercely... come to dance.
Serve the spicy chicken, I'm ready to eat.
Dark, dark boy, come closer without asking, without making a fuss.
Like a stack of crunchy snacks, don't crush me.
To relieve tiredness, I'll hug you, if the body aches, don't gather a crowd.
I'll tame you with my own hands, in the wrestling ring.
Dark, dark boy, come closer without asking, without making a fuss.
Come, come storm, I won't let you hit me, I won't let you watch the dance.
What are you doing? Are you playing tricks like a blooming lotus?
Look now, I'm going to clash with you, will you withstand it?
Fire, my anger is red.
